_doc: Domestic Interiors illustration system (I1). Hand-drawn line vignettes built from a vocabulary of small domestic objects. Used in empty states, onboarding, and marketing only — never as decoration in active UI. Replaces the prior 'subtle constellation in empty states' note as the system's signature surface treatment.

ink._doc: Three-ink palette. Mirror in colors_and_type.css as --ink-line / --ink-line-soft / --ink-line-warm.

line.doc: Primary line — Soft Lavender. ~70% of strokes.

lineSoft.doc: Secondary line — Dim Moonlight. Background contour, distant detail. ~25%.

lineWarm.doc: Warm point — Sky Teal. ONE per scene: a lit candle, steam off a cup, a flower, a star through the window. ~5%.

stroke._doc: Three-tier stroke weight. Never go below 0.75px or above 1.5px in the system.

vocabulary._doc: 12 motifs. New empty states should compose from these — do not invent new motifs without governance review.

motifs.name: window
motifs.doc: Four-pane window. The system's most-used motif.

motifs.name: cup
motifs.doc: Mug or cup. Optionally with steam (warm point).

motifs.name: doorway
motifs.doc: Arched doorway. For first-run, transitions, mode switches.

motifs.name: pillow
motifs.doc: Bed pillow. For low-energy / rest-state empty states.

motifs.name: lamp
motifs.doc: Table lamp. Lit (warm point) or unlit (offline / error).

motifs.name: book
motifs.doc: Open book. For journal / notes empty states.

motifs.name: plant
motifs.doc: Sprig in a pot. For onboarding / growth states.

motifs.name: horizon
motifs.doc: Distant horizon line. For 'inner horizons' moments.

motifs.name: tea
motifs.doc: Teapot or kettle. With steam (warm point).

motifs.name: candle
motifs.doc: Lit candle. Always carries the warm point.

motifs.name: moonsill
motifs.doc: Moon visible through a sill. For nighttime / private states.

applications._doc: Six canonical empty states. Each pairs ONE vignette with one short line of body copy and one action.

states.name: emptyJournal
states.copy: Nothing yet. When someone writes, this page fills in.

states.name: emptyFronting
states.copy: No one's logged a front yet. Tap to log who's here.

states.name: emptyFriends
states.copy: When you add someone, they'll show up here.

states.name: firstRun
states.copy: Welcome. Let's set up your system.

states.name: emptyNotes
states.copy: A quiet drawer. Drop a note in any time.

states.name: offline
states.copy: We'll catch up when you're back online.

do: One scene per empty state — no collages.
One warm-teal point per scene — a single lit thing.
Caveat italic for hand-lettered annotations only ('nothing here yet'). Never for instructions.
Pair with a single short line of body copy and one action.
Crop generously — empty space is part of the illustration.
dont: No people, faces, or human figures — too literal.
No color beyond the three-ink palette.
Don't reuse vocabulary as decoration in non-empty states.
Line only — never closed shapes with fills.
Don't shrink below 96px square; small spots use the icon set instead.
